title: PM Lane 412 Revision A - Project Miner Temp Power Lane 278 Sibling Import Contract Support No-Live Design Packet
governing_firewalls: Recognition firewall: apparatus revenue recognition reads frozen-at-import quote data from seam.apparatus_financials only.
Role-based table separation: Field Tech and Field Lead roles have no SELECT on financial tables.
Vocabulary firewall: the legacy actual revenue term is not a valid concept in this design.
allowed_future_writes: one seam.apparatus_financials row per apparatus per snapshot (INSERT only, never UPDATE)

readback_contract.apparatus_quote_coverage_count: count of distinct apparatus_id values in seam.apparatus_financials for the project's snapshot
readback_contract.apparatus_missing_quote_count: count of seam.apparatus rows for the project that have no seam.apparatus_financials row for the snapshot

rls_grants.seam.apparatus_financials: PM role and Finance role only for SELECT; PM role only for INSERT; no grants to Field Tech or Field Lead.
rls_grants.seam.project_contract_snapshots: PM role and Finance role only for SELECT; no grants to Field Tech or Field Lead.
rls_grants.seam.scope_labor_details: PM role and Finance role only for SELECT; no grants to Field Tech or Field Lead.
rls_grants.seam.apparatus_revenue_events: PM role and Finance role only for SELECT; PM role only for INSERT; no grants to Field Tech or Field Lead.

structural_eliminations: apparatus.contract_snapshot_id nullability concern resolved because the foreign key now lives on seam.apparatus_financials and is NOT NULL
update-then-freeze concern resolved because the future import-support write is pure INSERT into seam.apparatus_financials
validation_steps: Search confirms allowed_future_writes is insert-only into seam.apparatus_financials
Search confirms extractor mapping references apparatus_financials fields
Search confirms readback semantics reference apparatus_financials
Search confirms Field Tech and Field Lead have no grants on financial tables
Search confirms structural eliminations are explicit
